subcodes.first_line: O thou who art illumined with the light of guidance! Be thou neither sorrowful nor grieved by the torment, oppression and derision of thine enemies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستضی از نور هدی از اذیت و جفاء و شماتت اعداء محزون مباش مغموم مگرد همواره
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
